case_title: CAMDEN SECURITY SERVICES ET AL VS. HAKIA MARTIN

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MARTIN, HAKIA HEARING SET FOR JUL-31-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMDEN SECURITY SERVICES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-03-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-03-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF CAMDEN SECURITY SERVICES IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CAMERA LATOURETTE, CEO. DEFENDANT'S ARE NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF SUBMITTED A REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL (CIV-110) TO DISMISS DEFENDANT TARON GIDDENS ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

DEFENDANT HAKIA MARTIN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMDEN SECURITY SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTIN, HAKIA $4,071.77 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,176.77 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-03-2018 - JUDGMENT.
